title: telemetry — pipeline meta-metrics
description: Metrics ABOUT the telemetry pipeline itself. Every application module publishes its own metrics through this module; those live in the module's own metrics.json. Here we only capture pipeline health for the three signals.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.spans.recorded_total
metrics.description: Total spans recorded before export. kind = server / client / internal / producer / consumer.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.spans.exported_total
metrics.description: outcome = success / failure. Failures usually indicate exporter or network issues.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.spans.dropped_total
metrics.description: Reasons: queue_full / sampler_reject / exporter_reject / kill_switched. queue_full > 0 indicates backpressure.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.export.duration_ms
metrics.description: signal = traces / metrics. Duration of one batch export.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.buffer.depth
metrics.description: Current in-process buffer depth. Observable gauge polled at scrape.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.sampled_ratio
metrics.description: Rolling ratio of sampled vs total traces over last 5 minutes.

metrics.name: academorix.logs.records_emitted_total
metrics.description: Total records after successful pipeline pass. Grouped by log level + channel.

metrics.name: academorix.logs.pipeline.duration_ms
metrics.description: Per-record processor pipeline duration. P99 target < 2ms.

metrics.name: academorix.logs.redactions.applied_total
metrics.description: rule_kind = key_match / regex_match / class_attribute. Values 0 in production may indicate misconfigured redaction rules.

metrics.name: academorix.logs.sink.latency_ms
metrics.description: Latency to push one record to the configured sink.

metrics.name: academorix.logs.sink.buffer_depth
metrics.description: Current in-process buffer depth per sink.
